summary: #39245 is the best live canonical path for the OpenAI-compatible functions-prefix tool-call normalization bug, but it is not merge-ready: the hydrated PR is dirty against main, has a failing Real behavior proof check, and the latest ClawSweeper review calls out scope drift and behavior-proof blockers.
